title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-13
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Daily Greenhouse Check
gist.blurb: Polly did her daily rounds, watering the apps and checking the greenhouse metrics.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statuses in the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse documentation up-to-date with the latest health and usage statistics.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, checking on small pixel-art plants (representing apps) in a cozy greenhouse. She has a tiny clipboard to represent the metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on small glowing code-plants in a warm greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a cute bee mascot with a tiny clipboard checking on small glowing code-plants in a warm greenhouse. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
